inputs.name: ariaDescribedBy
inputs.description:
ID of an element that provides an extended description for the input.
Use this to associate error messages or help text with the input.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the input. Describe what the autocomplete represents.
Falls back to {@link placeholder} when neither this nor {@link ariaLabelledBy} is set.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: ID of an external element that provides the accessible name for the input.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: itemDisabled
inputs.description: Predicate or field name used to determine whether an individual item is disabled.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the autocomplete as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: highlightFirst
inputs.description: Defines whether the first matching item should be highlighted while typing.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Displays a loading indicator and prevents interaction while an operation is in progress.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected or entered.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Prevents value changes while preserving the component's visual state.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Marks the field as required for form validation.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Displays a button that clears the current value when clicked.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.
If null, the item itself is used as the display text.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the autocomplete is interacted with on blur, selection, clear, or committed input.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the autocomplete. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the value from a data item.
If null, the item itself is used as the value.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable current autocomplete value. Implements `FormValueControl<string | null>`,
enabling signal forms `[formField]` binding.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders this item with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: listDisabled
inputs.description: Reflects whether the parent breadcrumb is disabled. Controls compound disabled styling when only individual items are disabled.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the breadcrumb item via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: ariaHasPopup
inputs.description:
Value forwarded to the `aria-haspopup` attribute. Set when this button triggers a popup, menu,
listbox, tree, grid, or dialog. Omit or leave as `"false"` for plain action buttons.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's disabled state takes precedence.

inputs.name: iconOnly
inputs.description:
Removes horizontal padding and fixes a square aspect ratio sized to match `size`.
Provide `aria-label` on the host when using icon-only buttons.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description:
Displays a loading indicator and prevents interaction while an operation is in progress.
Sets `aria-busy="true"` on the host.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Visual style variant of the button. When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's look takes precedence.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description:
Border-radius preset applied to the component.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's value takes precedence.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description:
Whether the button is in the selected/pressed state. Drives `aria-pressed` when the button is toggleable.
Managed by `toggleable` click handling or by `ButtonGroup` selection policy.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description:
Size preset controlling the button's height and horizontal padding.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's value takes precedence.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description:
Tab index of the host element. Automatically overridden to `-1` when the button is disabled or loading.
Accepts a numeric string and converts it to a number.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Enables toggle behavior — each click flips the `selected` state and `aria-pressed` is managed.
Must use `[toggleable]="true"` binding syntax, not bare attribute form.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the checkbox as invalid, triggering error border and ring styling.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the checkbox.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Marks the checkbox as touched. Error styling is only shown when both `invalid` and `touched` are `true`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the chip represents.
When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: contentClick
inputs.description:
Emitted when the chip body is clicked or activated via Enter or Space.
Not emitted when the remove button is activated.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the chip with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Text label displayed inside the chip. When non-empty, takes precedence over projected content.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Visual style variant controlling the chip's background color, border, and interaction states.

inputs.name: removable
inputs.description: Renders a remove button inside the chip. When activated, emits the `remove` output.

inputs.name: remove
inputs.description:
Emitted when the remove button is clicked. Only fires when `removable` is `true`.
Emits the originating `Event`.

inputs.name: removeLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible label for the remove button, overriding the auto-computed `"Remove, <label>"` fallback.
Use when the chip shows only projected content and the default label is not descriptive enough.

inputs.name: removeTabIndex
inputs.description:
Tab index for the remove button, independent of the chip host's own tabindex.
Set to `-1` to exclude the remove button from tab order when an equivalent keyboard path exists elsewhere.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the chip.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description:
Whether the chip is selected. When `toggleable` is `true`, each activation flips this value.
Supports two-way binding via `[(selected)]`.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the chip's padding and remove button dimensions.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description:
Tab index override for the chip host element. When not set, computed automatically:
`0` when `toggleable` or `removable` is `true`, `-1` otherwise. Overridden to `-1` when `disabled` is `true`.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Enables toggle behavior. When `true`, each activation flips `selected`
and the host receives `role="checkbox"` with `aria-checked`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Arbitrary value associated with this chip.
Useful for identifying which chip was selected or removed in a collection.

inputs.name: add
inputs.description: Emitted before the grid displays the new-row editor.

inputs.name: cancel
inputs.description: Emitted before an edit operation is canceled.

inputs.name: cellEdit
inputs.description: Emitted when a cell is edited.

inputs.name: edit
inputs.description: Emitted before a row enters edit mode.

inputs.name: newRowFactory
inputs.description: Creates the initial data object used by the add-row editor.

inputs.name: remove
inputs.description: Emitted when a row remove command is triggered.

inputs.name: rowEdit
inputs.description: Emitted when a row edit is committed (row mode only).

inputs.name: rowKey
inputs.description: Field name or selector used to keep edited row identity stable when data is rebound.

inputs.name: save
inputs.description: Emitted before an edited or new row is saved.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description: Current filter descriptors applied to the grid.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Enables column filtering on the grid. Pass a `FilterableOptions` object to configure whether filters render in the header menu, a filter row, or both.

inputs.name: groupChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the applied group descriptors change, whether from dragging a column into the group panel or from a group sort change.

inputs.name: group
inputs.description: Current group descriptors applied to the grid.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Enables column grouping on the grid. Pass a `GroupableOptions` object to configure group footer display.

inputs.name: columnReorder
inputs.description: Emitted when a column is dropped into a new position. Call `preventDefault()` on the event to cancel the reorder.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Enables column reordering via drag and drop. Pass a `ReorderableOptions` object to configure it explicitly.

inputs.name: columnResize
inputs.description: Emitted when a column resize completes, with the column and its old and new widths.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Enables column resizing on the grid. Pass a `ResizableOptions` object to configure it explicitly.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Enables row selection on the grid. Pass a `GridSelectableOptions` object to configure single or multiple selection mode.

inputs.name: selectBy
inputs.description: Field name or selector used to derive a row's selection key.

inputs.name: selectedKeys
inputs.description: Currently selected row keys.

inputs.name: selectedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the set of selected row keys changes.

inputs.name: columnSort
inputs.description: Emitted when a column header is activated to change its sort direction. Call `preventDefault()` on the event to cancel the sort.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Enables column sorting on the grid. Pass a `SortableOptions` object to configure sort mode, unsort behavior, or sort-index display.

inputs.name: sort
inputs.description: Current sort descriptors applied to the grid.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: State persistence options such as schema version and page size persistence.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: The persisted grid state to apply and update when the grid state changes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Enables row virtualization on the grid. Pass a `VirtualScrollOptions` object to configure the fixed row height.

inputs.name: scrollEnd
inputs.description: Emitted when the scroll position reaches the configured threshold from the bottom of the virtualized list.

inputs.name: scrollEndThreshold
inputs.description: Distance, in rows, from the bottom of the virtualized list at which `scrollEnd` is emitted.

inputs.name: for
inputs.description:
Associates the label with a native control ID or a target that exposes a public `focus()` method.
String values are reflected as the native `for` attribute. Object targets receive focus when the label is clicked.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the native label element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: tagCount
inputs.description:
Number of selected item tags to display before collapsing the rest into a summary tag.
A negative value shows every selected item as its own tag and never renders the summary tag.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the radio button as invalid, triggering error border and ring styling.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the radio button.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Marks the radio button as touched. Error styling is only shown when both `invalid` and `touched` are `true`.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the textarea.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the textarea as invalid, triggering error border and ring styling.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Marks the textarea as touched. Error styling is only shown when both `invalid` and `touched` are `true`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the input as invalid, triggering error border and ring styling.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Marks the input as touched. Error styling is only shown when both `invalid` and `touched` are `true`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the tooltip is disabled. When disabled, the tooltip will not be shown.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description:
The filter to select elements that will have tooltips.
It can be a CSS selector that matches elements within the host element.
Only applies when `mode` is set to `content`.

inputs.name: hideDelay
inputs.description: The delay in milliseconds before hiding the tooltip.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description:
The mode of the tooltip.
"host" mode receives the tooltip from the host element's title attribute.
"content" mode uses the title attribute of elements matching the filter.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: showDelay
inputs.description: The delay in milliseconds before showing the tooltip after the trigger event.

inputs.name: hidden
inputs.description: Emitted when the tooltip popup is hidden.

inputs.name: shown
inputs.description: Emitted when the tooltip popup is shown.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: The text content displayed in the tooltip.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: tooltipId
inputs.description: The unique id for the tooltip element, used for aria-describedby linkage.

inputs.name: checkBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's check key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: checkedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently checked nodes.

inputs.name: checkedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the checked keys change.

inputs.name: hasCheckbox
inputs.description: Predicate that determines whether a node displays a checkbox. When unset, every node displays a checkbox.

inputs.name: nodeCheck
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is checked or unchecked.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures check mode and whether checking a node also checks its children or parents. Merged over `{ checkChildren: true, checkParents: true, enabled: true, mode: "multiple" }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: disableBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's disable key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: disabledKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently disabled nodes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether disabling a node also disables its children. Merged over `{ disableChildren: true, enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: nodeDrag
inputs.description: Emitted while a node is being dragged.

inputs.name: nodeDragEnd
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag ends.

inputs.name: nodeDragStart
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag starts.

inputs.name: nodeDrop
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is dropped.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether dragging nodes to reorder or reparent them is enabled. Merged over `{ enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: collapse
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is collapsed.

inputs.name: expand
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is expanded.

inputs.name: expandBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's expand key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: expandedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently expanded nodes.

inputs.name: expandedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the expanded keys change.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether expanding and collapsing nodes is enabled. Merged over `{ enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description: Current filter text used to narrow the visible nodes.

inputs.name: filterChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the filter value changes.

inputs.name: filterPlaceholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown in the filter input.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures the filter operator, case sensitivity, and debounce delay. Merged over `{ enabled: true, operator: "contains", caseSensitive: false, debounce: 0 }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: nodeSelect
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is selected or deselected.

inputs.name: selectBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's selection key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: selectedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently selected nodes.

inputs.name: selectedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selected keys change.

inputs.name: selectionChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selection changes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures selection mode, toggleability, and whether only child nodes are selectable. Merged over `{ childrenOnly: false, enabled: true, mode: "single", toggleable: false }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: alt
inputs.description:
Alternative text for the avatar image. Provide a meaningful description for non-decorative images;
an empty string marks the image as decorative.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the avatar represents.
When non-empty, the host receives `role="img"` in label and projected-content modes.

inputs.name: backgroundColor
inputs.description:
Background color of the host element.
Ignored in image mode — the background is set to transparent automatically.

inputs.name: borderColor
inputs.description: Border color of the host element.

inputs.name: borderRadius
inputs.description:
Border radius of the host element. Accepts a CSS string (`'50%'`, `'8px'`) or a number converted to `px`.
In image mode, the image is also clipped to this radius.

inputs.name: borderWidth
inputs.description: Border width of the host element. Accepts a CSS string or a number converted to `px`.

inputs.name: customStyles
inputs.description:
Inline styles applied after all other style inputs,
taking precedence over every computed style including `display`, `height`, and `width`.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Height of the host element. A string is used as-is; a number is converted to `px`.

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: Image URL. When non-empty, renders an `` and suppresses `label` and projected content.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Text label displayed inside the avatar when no image is provided. Ignored when `image` is non-empty.

inputs.name: labelColor
inputs.description: Color of the label text. Ignored in image mode.

inputs.name: labelFontSize
inputs.description: Font size of the label text. Ignored in image mode.

inputs.name: labelFontWeight
inputs.description: Font weight of the label text. Ignored in image mode.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: Width of the host element. A string is used as-is; a number is converted to `px`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the host element.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the breadcrumb navigation landmark.
Override when multiple breadcrumb components appear on the same page.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the entire breadcrumb with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction from all items.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the breadcrumb list via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Renders this item with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.
Has no visual effect when the parent breadcrumb is also disabled.

inputs.name: itemClick
inputs.description:
Emitted when the item is clicked or activated via keyboard.
Not emitted when this is the last (current-page) item or when the item is disabled.

inputs.name: allowEmpty
inputs.description:
When `false` and `selection` is `"single"`, at least one button must remain selected;
the active button cannot be deselected. Has no effect in `"multiple"` mode.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Override when multiple button groups appear on the same page
so screen reader users can distinguish them.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders all child buttons with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description:
Visual style variant propagated to all child buttons.
Also controls container-level divider and border behavior.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the container and the outer corners of the first and last child button.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable. Controls whether child buttons behave as a radio group (`"single"`)
or toggle independently (`"multiple"`).

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset propagated to all child buttons, overriding their individual `size` inputs.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the calendar.

inputs.name: disabledDates
inputs.description:
Sets the disabled dates of the calendar.
Accepts either an iterable of Date objects or a predicate function.

inputs.name: firstDay
inputs.description: Sets the first day of the week.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the calendar as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: maxDate
inputs.description: Sets the maximum date that can be selected.

inputs.name: minDate
inputs.description: Sets the minimum date that can be selected.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the calendar.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the calendar.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description: Sets the selection mode of the calendar.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the calendar value is changed by user interaction.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description:
Sets whether the calendar is required. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the calendar. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Adds custom CSS classes to the calendar host element.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The current value of the calendar.

inputs.name: weekNumber
inputs.description: Enables the display of week numbers in the calendar.

inputs.name: checked
inputs.description: Whether the control is checked.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description: Activates indeterminate mode, showing a dash instead of a checkmark.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox input loses focus.

inputs.name: inputChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox value changes.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox input gains focus.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the checkbox as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Text label displayed alongside the checkbox. When provided, takes precedence over projected content.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: Position of the label relative to the checkbox.

inputs.name: labelSize
inputs.description: Controls the font size of the label text.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Marks the control as required for form validation.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the checkmark box.

inputs.name: tabIndex
inputs.description: Tab index of the native checkbox input.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description: Emitted when the checkbox loses focus or its value changes.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Marks the checkbox as touched. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the label container via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: animate
inputs.description:
Enables CSS transitions on stroke and color changes.
Set to `false` when updating `value` at a high frequency.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the component represents (e.g., "Upload progress").
When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: ariaValueText
inputs.description:
Human-readable override for the `aria-valuenow` announcement.
Useful in indeterminate mode — set to a localized string such as `"Loading"`
so screen readers announce state rather than silence.
When empty, assistive technology falls back to the numeric value.

inputs.name: color
inputs.description:
Accent color. Pass a CSS color string, or a function receiving the current percentage (0–100) and
returning a string. When empty, falls back to the primary theme color.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description:
Activates indeterminate mode when the completion value is unknown.
ARIA value attributes are removed and `aria-busy` is set on the host element.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Upper bound of the value range. Must be greater than `min`.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Lower bound of the value range.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Diameter of the indicator in pixels. Controls both width and height of the host element.

inputs.name: thickness
inputs.description: Stroke width of the circular track in pixels.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Current progress value within `[min, max]`. Values outside the range are clamped before rendering; non-finite values are treated as `0`.

inputs.name: apply
inputs.description:
Emits when the Apply button is clicked.
The `Apply` button is only displayed when `showButtons` is set to true.

inputs.name: cancel
inputs.description:
Emits when the Cancel button is clicked.
The `Cancel` button is only displayed when `showButtons` is set to true.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the color gradient.

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Specifies the format of the color output.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the color gradient as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: opacity
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the alpha slider.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Marks the color gradient as required for form validation.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Specifies the rounded variant of the color picker.

inputs.name: showButtons
inputs.description:
Specifies whether the color picker should display the buttons.
When set to true, the color picker will display the "Apply" and "Cancel" buttons.
When set to false, the color picker will not display the buttons and will emit the color value on change.

inputs.name: showHexInput
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the hex input.

inputs.name: showColorInputs
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the channel inputs (RGB or HSV).

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the color gradient is interacted with on blur or value adjustment.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Marks the color gradient as touched. When bound to a signal form field via `[field]`,
this is written by the signal forms `Field` directive.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable current color value.
When undefined, the component keeps its default internal color state (white, #ffffffff).

inputs.name: columns
inputs.description:
The number of columns in the color palette grid.
Only applicable when using a custom palette.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the color palette as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: palette
inputs.description:
The palette to display — one of the built-in `"flat"`, `"material"`, or `"websafe"` schemes, or a
custom iterable of color strings. An empty custom palette falls back to the flat scheme.

inputs.name: readonly
